findings.issue: SKILL.md link uses non-relative path '.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md' instead of relative path. The task file lives at work/03-i18n/tasks/14.md, so the link resolves to work/03-i18n/tasks/.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md which does not exist. Tasks 11, 12, 13 in this batch correctly use '../../../.claude/skills/...'.
findings.fix: Change link target from `.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md` to `../../../.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md` to match the path style used in tasks 11, 12, 13.

findings.issue: SKILL.md link uses non-relative path '.claude/skills/pre-deploy-qa/SKILL.md' instead of relative path. Same issue as Task 14: link does not resolve from the task file's directory.
findings.fix: Change link target from `.claude/skills/pre-deploy-qa/SKILL.md` to `../../../.claude/skills/pre-deploy-qa/SKILL.md` to match path style used in tasks 11, 12, 13.

findings.issue: Several code-file context entries are listed as plain text (with backticks) rather than as markdown links. Examples: ``frontend/i18n/locales/en.json`` (line 64), ``frontend/i18n/locales/uk.json`` (line 65), ``frontend/playwright.config.ts`` (line 66), ``frontend/components/LangSwitcher.vue`` (line 67), ``frontend/pages/auth/login.vue`` (line 68), ``frontend/layouts/auth.vue`` (line 69). Template/task-creator rules require markdown links `[name](path)` for all Context Files entries.
findings.fix: Convert each plain-text path to a markdown link, e.g. `[frontend/i18n/locales/en.json](../../../frontend/i18n/locales/en.json)`. Tasks 12 and 13 in this batch already use markdown links throughout for code files.

findings.issue: Last bullet (line 173) is plain text without markdown link: 'спільний файл з NON_DEFAULT_LOCALES (per Task 2 — frontend/shared/i18n-locales.ts або inline)'. All other code-file entries are properly linked.
findings.fix: Either remove this dangling reference, or convert to a markdown link such as `[frontend/shared/i18n-locales.ts](../../../frontend/shared/i18n-locales.ts)` (with note that location is conditional).
